mechanism_summary: AFLFast FAST schedule multiplies energy by n_fuzz log2 factor, damping the saturated hash-lookup path to ~0.4x and starving structured DTD seeds; minimizer's calibration-only schedule avoids this damping entirely.
one_line: AFLFast n_fuzz damping starves structured seeds on saturated deep path

mechanism_summary: AFLFast FAST n_fuzz rarity damping throttles mutation budget on the frequently-hit attribute-validation path, exhausting energy before val reaches a non-zero state; minimizer's intrinsic-calibration-only schedule keeps mutating until the condition is met.
one_line: AFLFast n_fuzz energy damping exhausts mutation budget before val!=0 is reached
